sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current green blocks (N color)
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
n_objects = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'N']
print(f"N objects: {len(n_objects)}")
for n in n_objects[:3]:
    b = n['boundary']
    rows = [pt[0] for pt in b]
    cols = [pt[1] for pt in b]
    print(f"  N: rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}, pixels: {n['pixels']}")

# Find the center of the first green block
if n_objects:
    first = n_objects[0]
    b = first['boundary']
    min_row = min([pt[0] for pt in b])
    max_row = max([pt[0] for pt in b])
    min_col = min([pt[1] for pt in b])
    max_col = max([pt[1] for pt in b])
    center_row = (min_row + max_row) // 2
    center_col = (min_col + max_col) // 2
    print(f"\nFirst green block: rows {min_row}-{max_row}, cols {min_col}-{max_col}")
    print(f"Center: row {center_row}, col {center_col}")
    
    # Try removing one green block
    predict(expect_change=True, note='Remove first green block')
    action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': center_row, 'col': center_col}])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
